title: Add Code Review Comments to Diff

findings.title: Comment composer does not appear when clicking per-line Comment button
findings.description: Clicking the per-line Comment button on a diff line does not open the DiffCommentComposer textarea. The click registers but isActiveComment state does not toggle, preventing the composer from rendering.

findings.title: Diff code panel hard to reach due to fixed h-1/3 file list
findings.description: The diff view layout uses h-1/3 for the file list and a ScrollArea below for code. Page-level scrolling only scrolls the file list, making the actual code diff with per-line Comment buttons hard to access.

findings.title: Workspace base to Current comparison returns 0 files
findings.description: Selecting 'Workspace base' as from and 'Current' as to in the diff comparison controls returns 0 changed files despite commits existing on the branch.
